TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-09-2010 IN 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE WAS TRANSFERRED TO THE ASBESTOS DEPARTMENT, DEPT. 220, FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE KAHN. THERE BEING NO OBJECTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). AFTER PARTIES MEET AND CONFER IN THE HALLWAY, THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE THE PROPOSED ORDER AND DISTRIBUTE TO OPPOSING COUNSEL BY 3/10/10. IF THERE IS A DISPUTE AS TO THE PROPOSED ORDER, PARTIES MAY NOTICE AN INFORMAL HEARING BEFORE JUDGE KAHN FOR 3/16/10 AT 2:30PM IN DEPT. 220. NOTICE FOR THE INFORMAL HEARING MAY BE PROVIDED BY WAY OF E-MAIL TO CONTESTASBESTOSTR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: KIMBERLY JENNINGS, CSR #11452
